CompanyInfo.title: Product
CompanyInfo.details: AI Cover Letter Generator — Web App

ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: Build a free, no-signup AI tool that generates tailored cover letters from a PDF résumé and any job description — delivering high-quality, personalised output in seconds with no placeholder text.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: The core challenge was building a seamless pipeline that takes a raw PDF résumé, extracts its text server-side, and feeds it together with a job description into a large language model — all within a single API request with no user account required.

PDF parsing on the server required careful handling: unpdf runs on the Node.js runtime (not Edge), and the extracted text must be sanitised and truncated to keep token costs low while preserving the most relevant career information.
Structured AI output was enforced using Zod schemas and the Vercel AI SDK's generateObject, eliminating hallucinated placeholders like '[Company Name]' that typically plague template-based tools.

The UI follows an ElevenLabs-inspired light design system — Cormorant Garamond display headings, Inter body text, and a soft neutral palette — implemented with precise design tokens rather than utility-class shortcuts.

Internationalisation, a service worker for offline support, PWA manifest, SEO structured data (JSON-LD), and a React error boundary were all layered in to deliver a production-grade, accessible experience.
